input.needSummary: They want a daily report that pulls Shopify orders + Klaviyo email metrics + ShipStation status into one dashboard the founders check at 7am. Currently three browser tabs and a manual spreadsheet.
input.constraints: Must be ready in 6 weeks before holiday peak; founders are non-technical; budget mentioned ~$10k.
input.ourCapability: Full-stack TypeScript, Vercel, Postgres. Have done similar Shopify integrations.

cases.name: should disqualify — better served by no-code

input.needSummary: Wants a Google Sheet of leads automatically populated from a Typeform submission, with email notification.
